description: Test vectors for Priority enum (AMP v0.1.5). Covers all 5 valid values and invalid inputs.

vectors.note: Lowest priority. Agents process these after all higher-priority work.
Default priority level when no Priority header is set.
Elevated priority. Processed before normal and batch.
Time-sensitive work that should preempt normal processing.
Highest priority. Requires immediate processing. Use sparingly.

vectors.description: Invalid — 'low' is not a valid priority value
Invalid — 'high' is not a valid priority value
Invalid — 'NORMAL' wrong case (enum values are lowercase)
Invalid — 'medium' is not a recognized priority level
